meaning: n.奥西恩(传说中3世纪爱尔兰英雄和吟游诗人)
examples: Mr Rodriquez denied "hiring" Ossian for the photograph and says the star of his picture was a wild Wolf.
The best known Norwegian SARS were19th-century Marine biologists Michael SARS and his son georg ossian SARS.
The best known Norwegian Sars were 19th-century Marine biologists Michael Sars and his son, Georg Ossian Sars.
When you actually read the Ossian epics, you find that they are shaped entirely to neoclassical tastes.
Even if, as Johnson thought, a child could have written Ossian, children were never meant to read it.
